name: IMPORT: wire Route new kiosk vend output 3 here
info:
After importing these nodes:
1. Remove the existing output-3 wire from "Route new kiosk vend" to "Forward to Besiter flow".
2. Wire output 3 of "Route new kiosk vend" into "Route V2 bulk command expansion".
3. Deploy.

This flow handles new-kiosk server-side expansion for:
- eject specific
- eject all
- eject empty
- eject full
- eject locked
- eject count
- rent

It is self-contained for bulk V2 sends:
- queries Firestore for kiosk slot state
- applies documented vendslot-based selection/order
- stores vend confirmation context in flow context
- publishes the final module command directly as:
  topic: /<stationid>/<moduleid>/user/get
  payload: {"cmd":"popup_sn","data":"<chargerid>"}
- clears Firebase lock state for locked slots selected by eject actions
- keeps the individual vend confirmations
- sends one final aggregate toast only after all selected vend confirmations arrive on CSTA/post/+
- skips aggregate start/final toasts for single-slot eject specific requests

name: Route V2 bulk command expansion
Query kiosk in Firebase for V2 bulk
Expand and dispatch V2 bulk commands
Prepare direct popup_sn vend
Finalize V2 bulk completion toast
